_status: PROPOSED DRAFT - owner must review, edit, ratify (date + sign-off), then load; loads fail closed while status is not RATIFIED. Entries below are drawn directly from what Agent 07's code already does (transaction_milestone_config constructor default, wired for real 2026-07-17) - not invented independently.
_purpose: Post-contract transaction timeline milestones: which ones require a document request (08) and/or vendor scheduling (09), and what vendor kind. Complements milestone_map.json, which covers the pre-contract listing lifecycle only (intake through showing_active) - these two files are deliberately split, not overlapping duplicates. Adding a milestone here also requires passing the equivalent dict into Spoke07TransactionCoordinator(transaction_milestone_config=...) at deployment wiring time; editing this file alone does not yet auto-load into the running agent (no config-loading layer exists yet in this codebase for any config/*.json file - all of them are read externally and passed into constructors).
_not_covered_here: The per-milestone business logic in Agent 07's doc.status handling (inspection/appraisal/title/earnest_money/closing each check different payload fields and escalate differently) and the financing_contingency deadline-alert special case are genuinely distinct logic per milestone, not lookup data - they stay in Python and are not part of this file's scope.
